info.DAtuviSezaH: asya DAtoH rUpezu aco rahAByAM dve 8.4.46 iti vEkalpike dvitve kfte 'hUrCC' iti prApte tataH Kari ca 8.4.55 iti cartve 'hUrcC' iti cakArasahitaH CakAraH api Bavitum arhati
info.english_meaning: to fall off to move away to retract

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tasmAdyo manuzyARAM medyatyaSuBe medyati vihUrcCati hi na hyayanAya cana Bavati' (Sa0 brA0 2426) vihUrcCati pAdAvasya vizamI Bavata ityAha
